name: genai/validation
description: Attribute-based validation compiled to a reflection-free validator. Put #[NotBlank]/#[Email]/#[Length]/#[Pattern]/#[Matches] on a #[Validate] form class; a build-time processor bakes the rules into Cache\Validation. At runtime, validate a populated form object -> a field=>error map, no reflection. PHP 5.3-safe runtime.

suggest.genai/attribute: PHP 8 build-time scanning of #[Validate] forms via GenAI\Validation\Processor\ValidationProcessor.
